---
title: "Visualizations"
format: pdf
---


# Packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| label: data
#| echo: false

# read in data
veg <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "veg.csv"))

metadata <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "vp_veg_metadata.csv"))

# wrangle data
poaceae_species <- c(
  "Bromus_hordeaceus",
  "Festuca_perennis",
  "Stipa_pulchra",
  "Polypogon_monspeliensis",
  "Brachypodium_distachyon",
  "Festuca_myuros",
  "Avena_barbata",
  "Hordeum_marinum",
  "Avena_fatua",
  "Parapholis_incurva",
  "Bromus_diandrus",
  "Distichlis_spicata",
  "Bromus_catharticus",
  "Hordeum_murinum",
  "Hordeum_brachyantherum_brachy.",
  "Polypogon_viridis",
  "Cortaderia_selloana",
  "Festuca_bromoides",
  "Cynodon_dactylon",
  "Poa_annua",
  "Festuca_microstachys",
  "Crypsis_schoenoides",
  "Polypogon_interruptus",
  "Hordeum_brachyantherum",
  "Bromus_madritensis",
  "Elymus_triticoides"
)

native_forbs <- c(
  "Plantago_erecta",
  "Sisyrinchium_bellum",
  "Sidalcea_malviflora",
  "Eryngium_vaseyi",
  "Acmispon_maritimus",
  "Acmispon_wrangelianus",
  "Madia_sativa",
  "Psilocarphus_tennulus",
  "Psilocarphus_brevissimus",
  "Spergularia_macrotheca",
  "Centromadia_parryi_australis",
  "Lepidium_nitidum",
  "Stebbinsoseris_heterocarpa",
  "Laennecia_coulteri"
)

exclude_other <- c(
  "Bare Ground",
  "Natural Thatch",
  "unlisted",
  "moss",
  "boulder_rock",
  "biocrust",
  "Baccharis_pilularis",
  "Juncus_bufonius",
  "Juncus_phaeocephalus",
  "Eleocharis_macrostachya",
  "Eleocharis_acicularis",
  "Eleocharis_palustris"
)

target_veg <- veg |>
  filter(
    str_detect(transect_name, "GL"),
    site == "ncos",
    !psoc %in% exclude_other,
    !psoc %in% native_forbs
  )
```


# Plot 1: Timeseries
```{r}

```

# Plot 2: (_)
```{r}

```

# Plot 3: (_)
```{r}

```

# Plot 4: (_)
```{r}

```
